Martin L. Fineman, Esq. of DAVIS, WRIGHT, TREMAINE 276-6575, for defendants and opposing parties Adidas Promotional Retail Operations, Inc., Sport Chalet and Offside Soccer

Ruling:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- PLAINTIFFS VIVA! INTERNATIONAL VOICE FOR ANIMALS and JEROLD FRIEDMAN'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT -- Denied; Penal Code Sec. 6530 conflicts with Federal Regulations which permit importation of Kangaroo Products.
